sys_ui_script.description: This UI script contains all the common out of office client scrpts created in 2.8.1 2.8.1 | 2023-01-22 | raj | STRY0134743 - Out of Office Message on Task Request Form 2.8.1 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130635 - Task Form- Assignee is Out of Office
sys_ui_script.name: x_153465_discovert.DTech_Out_of_Office
